subject: [PATCH v4 01/10] fuse: separate next request fetching from sending logic

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch separates the logic of fetching and sending the next request in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) driver from io_uring, making the control flow clearer and reducing unnecessary parameter passing. The duplicated logic in fuse_uring_send_next_to_ring() is removed, and a new function fuse_uring_get_next_fuse_req() is introduced to fetch the next request without sending it immediately. This change simplifies the code and improves maintainability.
